titleStmt.title: SII 37.49: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 49. (A.R. No. B 394 of 1938-39.) Mōyiḷḷakālva, Cuddapah Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab lying in front of the Veṅkaṭēśvara temple.
This is dated in the cyclic year Śōbhakṛit, Vaiśākha ba. 12, Monday.

It records the consecration of the image of the goddess Lakshmidēvi and registers the gift of lands for providing food offerings and burning a perpetual lamp to the deity by Veṅgaḷappa, son of Rāyasam Timmarāju, for the merit of his guru Tāḷḷapāka Tirumalayyaṅgāru. Further it registers the gifts of land made to the same deity by the mahājanas of Raṁpatāṭi and also income collected on grāmakaṭnaṁ by the toll-officers. It also records a gift of land to the Āḷvārs.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śōbhakṛtu saṁvvatsara vaiśākha ba 12
sōmavāraṁ nāṁḍu rāyasaṁ timmaṁ
rājuṁgāri komāruṁḍu veṁggaḷappaṁ
gāru lakṣmīdēvaṁmma pratiṣṭa śēyiṁci dēvu
ni Āragiṁppulakunu Akhaṁḍa tiruvaḷi
kekunnu dhāravōsi yiccina cēnu rāvulapā
ṭi paḍumara paiṁḍikālvu polimēra tiru
veṁgaḷanāthaniki dhāravōśi Iccina puṭeṁ
ḍu cēni staḷānane lakṣmī Ammaku sama¨rppiṁcci
na cēnu puṭṭeṁḍu puliviṁda¨rmā maḍista
ḷaṁ tiruveṁgaḷaṁnātaniki sama¨rppiṁcina pa
duṁ maḍi staḷānanē lakṣmi Aṁmmaku sama[¨r]ppi
ṁcina maḍiyaṁdu munnu tama Ācāryulu
tāḷḷapāka tirumalayyaṁgāri puṇyaṁgā
nu sama¨rppistimi . raṁpatāṭi mahājanā
lutiruveṁgaḷanāṁtankitama Agrahārapu
polaṁlōnu pūliyakuṁṭa staḷaṁ brāhvala
palle polumēraku vuttaraṁ jaṁbhula cēni staḷaṁ
kiṁda tiruveṁgaḷanāthaniki sama¨rppiṁccina
yeṁdumu cēni staḷānanē lakṣmimaṁmaku
sama¨rppiṁccina cēnu tūmeṁḍu Āḷuvāru
laku sama¨rppiṁccina cēnu tūmeṁḍu
raṁppatāṭi grāma kaṭṇaṁ mūṁḍu māḷlu
nnu suṁkaṁ vāru meyiḷlakāluva tiruve
ṁgaḷanātaniki sama¨rppiṁcina gragrāmakaṭṭaṁ mū
ṁḍu māḍalakunnu mahājanālu cenu
mutuṁ vubhayacēnu paṁduṁ maḍi
yiṁduṁ vubhayaṁ mōḍacinalastaḷaṁ ye
ḍudumu brāhvalapala mahājanālu ta
ma polamulōnu cēnu tūmeṁḍu ceru
vu kiṁddha maḍi tūmeṁḍu . raṁppatāṭi
polaṁlōnu puvula mānyaṁ cenu yē
duṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vvāyōha
reti vasuṁdharā saṣṭi¨rvaruṣa sahasrāṇā
ṇāṁ viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyati krimi . svadattaṁ dvi
guṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradatānupālanaṁ pa
radatāpahārēṇa svadattā niṣpalaṁ bhavēt .
śrī śrī śrī jeyanu . lakṣmimaṁmaku
tōḍaṭaguti tiṁmanavuṁlitoṭapaṭusama¨rppi
sthimi . śrī śrī śrī jaya .
Digital edition of SII 37.49 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
